title: GPL transitive dependency in proprietary project — license violation
violated_rule: License compliance checked — no copyleft violations in proprietary projects
expected_feedback: P1 High: GPL-3.0 transitive dependency detected (github.com/baz/qux via github.com/foo/bar). Go statically links all dependencies — GPL propagates to your binary. Replace github.com/foo/bar with an alternative that does not pull in GPL code, or obtain legal approval.
